hero.badge: Free to use, no credit card required
hero.title: Go multilingual
hero.description: Add a language switcher to your website instantly. Your visitors translate your content into their native language, right in the browser.
hero.painPoint: Building a multilingual website is tedious and expensive. Translation services, separate domains, engineering overhead. We fix that.
hero.painPointSolution: Just add one script tag to your site. A language switcher widget appears. Powered by Google Translate. Visitors click and the entire page translates on the spot. Images and logos stay untouched, your design remains intact.
hero.imagesNote: Images and logos are excluded from translation. Your design stays exactly as intended.

speed.description: Async loading means zero impact on your page speed or Core Web Vitals.

docs.title: One Line to Go Global
docs.description: Add a multilingual language switcher to your website with a single script tag. Your visitors translate your content into their native language, instantly.

whatIs.title: What is LSwitch?
whatIs.intro: LSwitch makes your website multilingual instantly. Add it once, and your visitors can translate your entire site into their language with a single click. No developer needed, no server changes required.

points.title: Visitors stay longer
points.description: When people browse in their own language, they stay on your site longer. Lower bounce rates, higher engagement.

points.title: Live in 2 minutes
points.description: Paste one line of code into your HTML. That's it — your site is multilingual. No developer or technical setup needed.

points.title: Your design stays intact
points.description: Images, logos, and styled elements are excluded from translation. Your layout remains exactly as you designed it.

points.title: 100+ languages supported
points.description: Reach audiences worldwide — English, Japanese, Chinese, Spanish, Arabic, Hindi, and 95+ more languages.

quickStart.title: Quick Start Guide
quickStart.description: Get up and running in under 3 minutes.

steps.title: Create a free account
steps.description: Sign up at langswitch.online. No credit card required.

steps.title: Register your website
steps.description: Add your domain in the dashboard and choose which languages to support.

steps.title: Copy your script tag
steps.description: After registering your site, you'll get a personalized script tag. It looks like this:

steps.title: Paste it into your HTML
steps.description: Add the script tag inside the <head> section of your website. That's it — the language switcher will appear on your site automatically.

features.title: Features
features.description: Everything you need to make your website multilingual — nothing you don't.

items.title: Instant setup
items.description: Paste one line of code. Your site becomes multilingual immediately, no developer needed.

items.title: Every major language
items.description: 100+ languages including English, Japanese, Chinese, Spanish, Arabic, and more.

items.title: No extra costs
items.description: Translation runs in your visitor's browser. No server changes, no additional hosting bills.

items.title: See which languages your visitors speak
items.description: Track translation usage by language, page, and region. Know your global audience.

items.title: Matches your brand
items.description: Customize colors, position, size, and theme to fit your site perfectly.

items.title: Zero impact on site speed
items.description: Loads asynchronously in the background without slowing down your page.

customization.title: Make it yours
customization.description: Customize the widget to match your site's look and feel perfectly.

items.label: Position
items.description: Place it in any corner of the screen — wherever it fits your layout best.

items.label: Color
items.description: Match your brand colors with a custom background. Blend it into your site seamlessly.

items.label: Size
items.description: Choose small, medium, or large to find the perfect fit for your design.

items.label: Theme
items.description: Light, dark, or auto mode — automatically adapts to your visitor's preference.

items.label: Opacity
items.description: From subtle and transparent to bold and visible. You decide how much attention it gets.

items.label: Language selection
items.description: Show only the languages your audience actually speaks. Hide the rest.

items.question: Will this slow down my website?
items.answer: No. The widget loads in the background without blocking your page rendering. Visitors won't notice any difference in load time.

items.question: Do I need to change anything on my server?
items.answer: No. Everything runs in the visitor's browser. No server changes, no API keys, no additional setup on your end.

items.question: Will my images or layout be affected?
items.answer: No. Only text content is translated. Images, logos, and styled elements remain exactly as they are.

items.question: Is there a free plan?
items.answer: Yes. The free plan includes 50 translations per month with all core features. Pro plan (¥980/mo) removes the limit.

items.question: Does this work with my website platform?
items.answer: Yes. LSwitch works with any website that supports HTML — WordPress, Next.js, React, Shopify, static sites, and more.

cta.title: Ready to go global?
cta.description: Start translating your website in under 3 minutes. Free, no credit card required.
